subject: You WON!!! Cliam ur prize 🎁🎁
body: Congrtulations!! ur among the selcted few winnrs of our excluive raffle. Click here immediately to cliam ur $5000 gift card b4 it expires tonite. Act NOW!!!

ground_truth.label: spam
ground_truth.notes: Classic phishing/spam with typos and urgency scarcity tactics

subject: Production DB is down — customers cannot checkout
body: Hi team, our production database went down at 14:32 UTC. Customers are unable to complete purchases. Error logs show connection pool exhausted. We need this fixed ASAP — every minute is costing us roughly $2k in lost sales. On-call engineer is not picking up. Please escalate immediately.

subject: Q3 report — feedback needed by Friday
body: Hey, hope you're doing well. I've attached the Q3 performance report we discussed last week. Could you take a look and send back any feedback before Friday EOD? No rush if you're busy, just let me know if the timeline doesn't work. Thanks!

ground_truth.label: normal
ground_truth.notes: Standard business communication, polite and low urgency

subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: Invoice dispute #4421
body: This is the FOURTH time I'm writing about this. Invoice #4421 shows a $3,200 charge for services we never received. I was told it would be resolved 3 weeks ago. If I don't hear back today I will have no choice but to involve our legal team.

thread_history.subject: Invoice dispute #4421
thread_history.snippet: Hi, I noticed an error on invoice #4421...

thread_history.subject: RE: Invoice dispute #4421
thread_history.snippet: Thank you for reaching out, we are looking into this...

thread_history.subject: RE: RE: Invoice dispute #4421
thread_history.snippet: It's been a week, any update?

ground_truth.label: urgent
ground_truth.notes: VIP client with repeated unresolved issue — escalation is the correct action

subject: Your weekly tech digest 📰 — AI, cloud, security
body: This week in tech: OpenAI announces new model tier. AWS re:Invent preview. Top 10 VS Code extensions for 2024. Click below to read full stories. Unsubscribe | Manage preferences.

ground_truth.label: spam
ground_truth.notes: Legitimate newsletter but still unsolicited bulk mail — classify as spam

subject: can u check the staging deploy??
body: hey, deployed the new feature to staging like 20 mins ago but the tests r failing. think its the env variables again lol. can u take a look when u get a chance? no rush but kinda blockin me

ground_truth.label: normal
ground_truth.notes: Informal internal message with typos — normal priority, reply needed

subject: Partnership opportunity — urgent response needed
body: Dear team, I represent a major venture fund interested in a strategic partnership with your company. We have $50M allocated for Q4 deployment. Please have your BD lead contact me at the number below before COB today as we have another meeting scheduled tomorrow. This opportunity will not wait.

ground_truth.label: urgent
ground_truth.notes: High-value inbound — urgent but requires escalation to BD/leadership, not a direct reply

subject: Action required: Complete benefits enrollment by Dec 1
body: Hi, this is a reminder that your annual benefits enrollment window closes December 1st. Please log in to the HR portal and make your selections. If you have questions, contact benefits@ourcompany.com. Note: failure to enroll will result in default plan assignment.

ground_truth.label: normal
ground_truth.notes: Internal HR comms — normal priority, reply to confirm receipt

subject: ⚠️ Unusual activity detected on your account — verify now
body: We detected suspicious login from IP 192.168.1.1 in Russia. Your account has been temporarily limited. Click here to verify your identity and restore access: http://secure-boa-verify.xyz/login. Enter your SSN and card number to proceed.

ground_truth.label: spam
ground_truth.notes: Phishing attempt — suspicious domain, requests PII, do NOT reply

subject: Contract renewal — need updated pricing by EOD
body: Hi, our contract with you expires Jan 15 and procurement needs the renewal quote and updated SLA terms by end of today so we can get approvals in time. This is a $2.4M annual contract so please treat this as priority. Let me know if you need anything from our side.

thread_history.subject: Contract renewal reminder
thread_history.snippet: Just a heads-up that our contract is coming up for renewal next month...

ground_truth.label: urgent
ground_truth.notes: High-value contract renewal — urgent, escalate to sales/account management

subject: great content!! check out my blog
body: Hey!! I just read your website and loved it!! I run a blog about making money online and I think your readers would love it too!! Can we do a guest post exchange?? Visit myblog-money-fast.net for more!! 😎😎

subject: Delivery update — shipment delayed by 3 days
body: Dear team, I wanted to give you a heads-up that the shipment for order #TK-8821 has been delayed by approximately 3 business days due to port congestion at Rotterdam. New estimated delivery is Nov 28. Apologies for the inconvenience. Please let me know if you need any documentation.

ground_truth.label: normal
ground_truth.notes: Routine supplier update — normal priority, acknowledge and inform internal stakeholders

subject: Payroll run failed — immediate attention required
body: URGENT: The payroll batch for Nov 30 failed due to a mismatch in employee bank account records. 47 employees will not receive their salaries if this is not resolved in the next 2 hours. Please contact finance@ourcompany.com or call ext. 5500 immediately.

ground_truth.label: urgent
ground_truth.notes: Critical internal operations failure — escalate immediately

subject: You have a new 1-star review — respond within 24h
body: A customer left a 1-star review on your product: 'Terrible experience. Package arrived damaged and customer service was unhelpful. Never buying again.' We recommend responding within 24 hours to maintain your seller rating. Reply to this email with your response.

ground_truth.label: normal
ground_truth.notes: Customer review response — normal priority, empathetic reply required

subject: Scheduled maintenance: email server downtime Sat 02:00–06:00 UTC
body: This is an automated notification. Our email server will undergo scheduled maintenance this Saturday from 02:00 to 06:00 UTC. During this window, sending and receiving emails will be unavailable. No action is required from your side. For urgent matters, please use Slack.

ground_truth.label: normal
ground_truth.notes: Automated internal IT notice — no action needed, can acknowledge
